payload.summary: Implemented provider-neutral autopilot dispatch across the coordinator, autopilot phase helpers, lifecycle skill docs, and dry-run provider smoke harness. The implementation preserves Claude Code compatibility while resolving Codex and Gemini models through provider-specific mappings.
completed_work: Added provider model map defaults and schema support in agent-coordinator archetype resolution.
Added provider-aware phase resolution through the coordinator endpoint and bridge helper.
Added HTTP-first/local agents.yaml dispatch config discovery without requiring Claude config.
Added provider-neutral phase dispatch payloads, adapter result normalization, runner --provider support, and provider-aware token budget reporting.
Updated autopilot and called lifecycle skills to use provider-neutral dispatch terminology.
Added Codex/Gemini dry-run smoke harness and manual smoke documentation.
Completed change-context traceability and all tasks.md checkboxes.

decisions.title: Resolve archetype models through provider maps
decisions.rationale: This preserves legacy Claude aliases while preventing opus/sonnet/haiku from being dispatched to Codex or Gemini.

decisions.title: Keep adapter boundary small
decisions.rationale: The provider dispatch module normalizes payload/result contracts and lets each runtime supply its own runner without rewriting autopilot state management.

decisions.title: Use local agents.yaml fallback before provider-native config
decisions.rationale: Codex and Gemini-only environments should discover repo-local dispatch config without requiring ~/.claude.json.

next_steps: Run PR review on the implementation.
Run cleanup-feature after approval to execute Docker-dependent validation gates before merge.

relevant_files.description: Provider model mapping and provider-aware archetype resolution
